{% raw %}
{% endraw %}

Reproducible research code for the following paper:

Albinet et al., 2022. Prediction of Exchangeable Potassium in Soil through Mid-Infrared Spectroscopy and Deep Learning:from Prediction to Explainability. (Review name)

Install

pip install mirzai

How to use

Getting the data

A zipped archive of the data used in this study are available for download at the following link: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ozHZ8KHZeuaiv8lTycxe2-yo27BhFnUt/view?usp=sharing

In a local environment

The preferred way it to use Mamba

In Google Colab

...

Paper reproduced
